content_blocks.text: I'll spawn two sub-agents in parallel, each scoped to just `web_fetch`.

input.prompt: Fetch the page at https://facts.test/alpha using the web_fetch tool. Find the Alpha probe's surface gravity value. Report the exact value with its units, and quote the sentence or line where you found it. If the page cannot be fetched or the value is not present, say so explicitly.
input.title: Alpha probe surface gravity

input.prompt: Fetch the page at https://facts.test/beta using the web_fetch tool. Find the Beta probe's surface gravity value. Report the exact value with its units, and quote the sentence or line where you found it. If the page cannot be fetched or the value is not present, say so explicitly.
input.title: Beta probe surface gravity
